PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q3300 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER regex(STR(?date) , '-04-01')
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
